query: SELECT id, agentCode, CONCAT(firstName, ' ', lastName) as fullName FROM agents WHERE firstName LIKE '%Zaid%' OR firstName LIKE '%Augustina%' OR firstName LIKE '%Oluwatosin%' OR firstName LIKE '%Shedrack%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4XhD5JGzFycvBf8.root --database iwEifGeLgtJbCVjTZgrjir --execute SELECT id, agentCode, CONCAT(firstName, ' ', lastName) as fullName FROM agents WHERE firstName LIKE '%Zaid%' OR firstName LIKE '%Augustina%' OR firstName LIKE '%Oluwatosin%' OR firstName LIKE '%Shedrack%';
